author: curtgrimes
description: Add interactive metronomes to your notes.

manifest.author: Curt Grimes
manifest.description: Add interactive metronomes to your notes.
manifest.name: Metronome

name: Metronome

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description:
- Fix issue where metronomes may not start in reading view if there are multiple on a page (#7)
- Add Spanish localization (thanks @PabloOQ!)
- Add Portuguese localization 

If you would like to contribute a localization in your own language, please [see localization instructions here](https://github.com/curtgrimes/obsidian-metronome-plugin/tree/master/src/i18n). Thank you!

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description:
- Add new `stopAfter` and `countdown` options:
  - `stopAfter`: Automatically stop the metronome after the given duration. Examples: duration like `30s`, `1h`, `1h30m`
  - `countdown`: When used in conjunction with `stopAfter`, this controls how long the "Stopping in..." countdown button appears for before the metronome automatically stops. Set to `always` to always show the countdown. Defaults to `10s`.

![demo-stop-after](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/3038600/148163743-94b40495-e296-46f5-9687-bf4ac5e9f4b0.gif)

[See the documentation](https://github.com/curtgrimes/obsidian-metronome-plugin/blob/master/README.md) to learn more.

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description:
- Add i18n support. [Contributions for new translations](https://github.com/curtgrimes/obsidian-metronome-plugin/tree/master/src/i18n) are welcome!
- Add support for math expressions in bpm value

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description:
Fixes

- Fix missing `sass` import

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description:
- Add new [`dots` style](https://github.com/curtgrimes/obsidian-metronome-plugin#dots-style)
- Fix pulse desync over time
- Refactor Metronome component

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description:
## Breaking changes
- The `sound` parameter is renamed to `instrument`.
- The `beepTick` parameter is renamed to `tickNotes`.
- The `beepTock` parameter is renamed to `tockNotes`.

For example, this old configuration:
````markdown
```metronome
bpm: 80
sound: beep
beepTick: F4
beepTock: D4
```
````

should now look like this in 0.5.0 and later:

````markdown
```metronome
bpm: 80
instrument: beep
tickNotes: F4
tockNotes: D4
```
````

## New features and improvements
- Added new instruments in addition to the existing `click` and `beep`: `AMSynth`, `DuoSynth`, `FMSynth`, `MembraneSynth`, `MetalSynth`, `MonoSynth`, `PluckSynth`. See [examples in readme](https://github.com/curtgrimes/obsidian-metronome-plugin#using-different-instruments-and-tones) for usage.
- Added support for chords in `tickNotes` and `tockNotes`. Example:

  ````markdown
  ```metronome
  bpm: 80
  meter: 4/4
  instrument:beep
  tickNotes: F4,A4,C4
  tockNotes: D4,F4,A4
  ```
  ````
- Made configuration parameter names case-insensitive.

## Fixes
- Made mute button match theme appearance.
- Fixed compatibility with the [Cecilia May Primary](https://github.com/ceciliamay/obsidianmd-theme-primary) theme.

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description:
- Make entire metronome clickable to toggle on/off and move mute button to left.
- Improve the experience on mobile by making the entire metronome clickable. (Desktop version also uses this same design so they match.)
- Move the mute button to the left to prevent it from overlapping the edit button in live preview mode.
- Make metronome match user-selected Obsidian theme.
- Improve positioning of elements on medium, large, and xlarge sizes.

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description: Fix compatibility with iOS and restore compatibility with older Obsidian v0.12.19.

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description: - Allow metronome sound to continue to play from collapsed sidebar (#2)

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description:
Updates since 0.2.0:
- Add compatibility with Obsidian 13 and live preview mode.
- Fix issue where metronome sound stops if the metronome is scrolled down the page. (#1)
- Fix issue where animation could become desynchronized from the sound when scrolling the metronome off the page and back on.
- Use Obsidian's native tooltips.
- Properly clean up components when being unloaded.

releases.author: curtgrimes
releases.description:
- Add size: `xlarge`
- Add styles: `pendulum` and `line`
- Improve smoothness of  pendulum swing effect when starting animation
- Split CSS into Vue components
- Minify production builds
